subtitle: Marie away all week, James returns Thursday, multiple projects blocked
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-12 June, blocking DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal comments and volunteer reporting queries that require her input. James Salas Guillen returns Thursday 18 June after annual leave, leaving H&S support and Cority DSE interface work without primary coverage until then. Michael O'Sullivan returns today 8 June from absence. The IM Principles URL change goes live 23-24 June - Laura Porter confirmed the new URL with you on 3 June. Kevin and Chris are covering H&S support queue and OSM escalations during James's absence. The Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model review is blocked pending Natasha Heaton's product owner return from sick leave. DTP1092 has active pending comments from Marie requiring resolution before college staff PeopleXD work can proceed. Open first: the H&S Handover email from James Salas Guillen (5 June 15:44) which outlines outstanding items and coverage arrangements during his 8-18 June absence.

urgent.title: H&S Handover - James absence coverage
urgent.sub: James Salas Guillen on leave 8-18 June. Open handover document immediately to understand Cority DSE interface, contractor record creation process, and PXD-Cardinus data upload monitoring. Kevin and Chris covering.
urgent.subject: H&S Handover

urgent.title: DTP1092 - College Staff in PXD Proposal - blocked
urgent.sub: Marie Cooksey has left multiple comments (4 June 14:16, 14:45; 5 June 08:53) awaiting your response on college data in PeopleXD. Cannot proceed with proposal until you and Simon Burford review her feedback.
urgent.subject: Marie Cooksey left a comment in "DTP1092 - College Staff in PXD Proposal"

urgent.title: IM Principles URL - go-live 23-24 June
urgent.sub: Laura Porter confirmed new URL goes live 23-24 June and old page comes down. You have pending follow-up with Laura (3 June 11:25). Update PeopleXD links this week before cutover.
urgent.subject: RE: IM Principles - change to URL

needs.title: Halo ER Case Management - review date pending
needs.sub: Natasha Heaton (4 June) reports product owner is off sick. Cannot set review date for Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model until they return. Follow up with Natasha on status.
needs.subject: RE: Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model - Approval Confirmation

needs.title: DSE data upload monitoring - James away
needs.sub: Automated PXD to Cardinus interface went live 3 June. James confirmed live on 5 June but noted H&S admin team manually creating contractor records. Monitor upload quality and contractor account requests while James on leave 8-18 June.
needs.subject: RE: DSE Update - user data import and upload to Cardinus

needs.title: Volunteer reporting response - Marie away
needs.sub: Marie Cooksey (4 June) needs response to Pay & Conditions programme on volunteer reporting options. Julie Hickman confirmed only annual leave and sick leave can be requested by employees. Cannot action until Marie returns 13 June.
needs.subject: Question re Volunteer reporting

needs.sub: HR Systems Communications (1 June) called for content for June 2026 bulletin. Unread since 1 June. Check if contribution still needed.
needs.subject: Call for content - HR Systems Bulletin (June 2026)
